zh.lifeSummary: 當Hanss Georg Kieffer於大約1630年出生在德國巴登可萊斯 卡爾茲盧時，他的父親Hans Jacob Kieffer22歲，母親Katherina31歲。他於大約1653年與Margretha Helena Widman在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1691年9月2日在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hanss Georg Kieffer于大约1630年出生在德国巴登可萊斯 卡爾茲盧时，他的父亲Hans Jacob Kieffer22岁，母亲Katherina31岁。他于大约1653年与Margretha Helena Widman在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1691年9月2日在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kieffer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Luxembourgish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Kiefer . The surname Kieffer is also found in the province of Luxembourg and elsewhere in Wallonia (Belgium).

variants.name: Kiefer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Franz, Erwin, Heinz, Dieter, Fritz, Alois, Aloys, Claus, Ernst, Florian, Frieda.
German: occupational name for a cooper or the overseer of a wine cellar, from an agent derivative of Middle High German kuofe ‘vat, barrel’ (from Latin cupa).
German: possibly also from an agent derivative of Middle High German kiffen ‘to quarrel’, hence a nickname for a bickerer.

nameMeanings.name: Hanss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Georg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Hanss Georg Kieffer was born about 1630, in Karlsruhe, Baden, Germany, his father, Hans Jacob Kieffer, was 22 and his mother, Katherina, was 31. He married Margretha Helena Widman about 1653, in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 2 September 1691, in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hanss Georg Kieffer est né environ 1630, à Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Allemagne, son père, Hans Jacob Kieffer, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Katherina, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margretha Helena Widman environ 1653, à Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 2 septembre 1691, à Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hanss Georg Kieffer um 1630 in Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hans Jacob Kieffer 22 und seine Mutter Katherina 31. Er hat um 1653 in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Margretha Helena Widman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 2. September 1691 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

Lui sposato Margretha Helena Widman circa 1653, nel Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Hanss Georg Kiefferが約1630年にドイツバデンクレイス カルルスルヘで生まれた時，父Hans Jacob Kiefferは22歳，母Katherinaは31歳であった。約1653年にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘブランケンロチでMargretha Helena Widmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1691年9月2日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘブランケンロチで62歳で死去した。

ko.Blankenlöch, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württember: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 블랭켄럭
ko.lifeSummary: Hanss Georg Kieffer(이)가 대략 1630년 독일 바든 크레이스 칼스루헤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hans Jacob Kieffer(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherina(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1653년 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 블랭켄럭에서 Margretha Helena Widman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1691년 9월 2일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 블랭켄럭에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hanss Georg Kieffer nasceu aproximadamente 1630, em Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Alemanha, seu pai, Hans Jacob Kieffer, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Katherina, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margretha Helena Widman aproximadamente 1653, em Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de setembro de 1691, em Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hanss Georg Kieffer родился около 1630 г. в местности крис карлсрух, баден, Германия, его отцу по имени Hans Jacob Kieffer было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Katherina, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margretha Helena Widman около 1653 г. в местности бланкенлоч, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 2 сентября 1691 г. в местности бланкенлоч, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден в возрасте 62 лет.

Se casó con Margretha Helena Widman aproximadamente 1653, en Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de septiembre de 1691, en Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, a la edad de 62 años.
